summary: Backend API testing completed for Vivo BI Dashboard iteration 4 (major rebuild). All 26 tests passed. Verified: (1) NEW /api/country-summary returns 4 countries (Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Online), (2) NEW /api/analytics/insights returns CEO report text with '%' and 'KES', (3) NEW /api/analytics/returns returns top_channels sorted by returns, (4) Multi-value aggregation works correctly (Kenya+Uganda total_sales ~43.7M matches sum of individual), (5) New KPI fields (total_sales, total_discounts, total_returns, return_rate) present, (6) Old endpoints (highlights, by-country, new-styles, kpis-plus) correctly removed (404).

minor.issue: Upstream API does not guarantee sorting by total_sales for single-country requests. Sorting only applied in multi-country aggregation path.
Upstream API does not guarantee sorting by sor_percent for single-country requests. Sorting only applied in multi-country aggregation path.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider adding sorting to single-country /api/top-skus and /api/sor paths for consistency (currently only multi-country paths sort)
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-value aggregation (comma-separated country/channel) works correctly - agg_kpis properly recomputes avg_basket_size, avg_selling_price, return_rate after summing
Kenya total_sales ~39.9M, Kenya+Uganda ~43.7M - aggregation math verified
Country summary includes all 4 countries: Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Online
Old endpoints (highlights, by-country, new-styles, kpis-plus) correctly return 404
Backend code is clean and well-structured with proper error handling for upstream API failures
test_credentials: None required - read-only public API proxy
seed_data_creation: None - uses external Vivo BI API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 major rebuild complete. All new endpoints working: /api/country-summary, /api/analytics/insights, /api/analytics/returns. Multi-value aggregation (country=Kenya,Uganda) verified. Old endpoints removed. Date range 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-17 has data. Kenya ~39.9M, Uganda ~3.8M, Rwanda ~1.6M, Online ~0.1M total_sales.
